variants.en: My mother passed away last week. I feel empty. I keep reaching for my phone to call her and then remembering. The house is so quiet.
variants.roman_urdu: Meri ammi pichle hafte wafat paa gayi. Main bilkul khali feel kar raha hoon. Baar baar phone uthata hoon unko call karne ko aur phir yaad aata hai. Ghar bohot khamosh hai.
variants.urdu_script: میری امی پچھلے ہفتے وفات پا گئیں۔ میں بالکل خالی محسوس کر رہا ہوں۔ بار بار فون اٹھاتا ہوں انہیں کال کرنے کو اور پھر یاد آتا ہے۔ گھر بہت خاموش ہے۔

variants.en: I have my final exam tomorrow and I have not slept in two days. My heart is racing and I keep thinking I am going to fail and disappoint my parents.
variants.roman_urdu: Kal mera final exam hai aur do din se neend nahi aayi. Dil bohot tez dharak raha hai aur bas yehi soch raha hoon ke main fail ho jaunga aur apne ammi abbu ko mayoos kar dunga.
variants.urdu_script: کل میرا فائنل امتحان ہے اور دو دن سے نیند نہیں آئی۔ دل بہت تیز دھڑک رہا ہے اور بس یہی سوچ رہا ہوں کہ میں فیل ہو جاؤں گا اور اپنے امی ابو کو مایوس کر دوں گا۔

variants.en: I have a big interview in the morning. I keep rehearsing answers and none feel good enough. What if they see through me? What if I freeze?
variants.roman_urdu: Subah ek bohot bari interview hai. Main baar baar jawab rata raha hoon lekin koi bhi theek nahi lag raha. Agar unhone mujhe pehchan liya to? Agar main freeze ho gaya to?

variants.en: The bills are piling up and I do not know how I will pay rent this month. I keep calculating numbers and they never add up. My chest is constantly tight.
variants.roman_urdu: Bills bohot ikhatte ho gaye hain aur is mahine kiraya kaise dunga pata nahi. Hisaab lagata hoon lekin kuch samajh nahi aata. Seene mein humesha bhari pan rehta hai.

variants.en: I am caring for my sick mother, raising three kids, and trying to work. I have not had a single hour to myself in months. I am going to break.
variants.roman_urdu: Apni beemar ammi ka khayal rakhna, teen bachon ko palna, aur kaam bhi. Mahinon se ek ghanta bhi apne liye nahi mila. Main toot jaunga.

variants.en: Alhamdulillah a year ago I was in the ICU. Today I walked 5 kilometers. I never thought I would feel my legs again. Every breath is gratitude.
variants.roman_urdu: Alhamdulillah aik saal pehle main ICU mein tha. Aaj maine 5 kilometer chal kar kiya. Socha bhi nahi tha ke phir kabhi apne paon mehsoos kar sakunga. Har saans ek shukar hai.

variants.en: Alhamdulillah I finally got the job offer I prayed so hard for. After months of interviews and rejections, Allah opened this door for me.
variants.roman_urdu: Alhamdulillah aakhir mujhe wo job mil gayi jis ke liye main bohot dua karta tha. Mahinon ke interviews aur rejections ke baad Allah ne ye darwaza khol diya.

variants.en: I am the only Muslim in my program and I eat every meal alone. I pray alone, I break my fast alone. Weekends are the worst. I feel invisible.
variants.roman_urdu: Main apne program mein akela Musalman hoon aur har khana akele khata hoon. Akele namaz parhta hoon, akele roza kholta hoon. Weekend sab se bura hota hai. Mujhe laggta hai koi mujhe dekhta hi nahi.

variants.en: I moved abroad for studies and it has been six months. I miss my family so much it physically hurts. I cry after every phone call home.
variants.roman_urdu: Parhai ke liye mulk se bahar aaya hoon aur chhe mahine ho gaye. Ghar ki itni yaad aati hai ke dil mein dard hota hai. Har baar ghar baat karne ke baad rota hoon.

variants.en: Before Islam I did things I cannot forgive myself for. I know Allah forgives but I cannot let go of the shame. It eats me every day.
variants.roman_urdu: Islam se pehle maine aise kaam kiye jinhe main khud maaf nahi kar pa raha. Pata hai Allah maaf kar dete hain lekin main sharm se nikal nahi pa raha. Har din khata rehta hai mujhe.

variants.en: Another rejection today. Number 47. I do not know why I keep trying. Nothing I do is working. I feel like giving up on life plans entirely.
variants.roman_urdu: Aaj phir rejection. 47 number. Pata nahi kyun koshish karta ja raha hoon. Kuch bhi kaam nahi kar raha. Lagta hai zindagi ke sare plan chor dun.

variants.en: I graduated six months ago and I have no job. I am running out of savings. I am scared I will end up a failure and disappoint everyone.
variants.roman_urdu: Chhe mahine pehle graduate hua tha, ab tak koi job nahi mili. Bachat khatam ho rahi hai. Dar lagta hai ke main fail ho jaunga aur sab ko mayoos kar dunga.

variants.en: Work deadlines, three kids, a sick parent, and trying to pray five times a day. I feel pulled in every direction and failing at all of them.
variants.roman_urdu: Kaam ki deadlines, teen bachay, ek beemar walidain, aur paanch waqt ki namaz ki koshish. Har taraf khincha ja raha hoon aur kisi mein bhi theek se nahi kar pa raha.

variants.en: I can't handle this anymore. Work is destroying me and my health is suffering.
variants.roman_urdu: Main ye sab handle nahi kar pa raha anymore. Work bohot zyada hai aur meri health kharab ho rahi hai.

variants.en: I am very worried, nothing is working out.
variants.roman_urdu: Bohot pareshan hoon, kuch kaam nahi ho raha.

variants.en: I am nervous about tomorrow, I don't know what will happen.
variants.roman_urdu: Kal ke lye bht ghabrahat hai, pta nai kya hoga.

variants.en: I am very sad today, nothing feels right. Everything seems heavy.
variants.hindi: Aaj main bahut dukhi hoon, kuch bhi theek nahi lag raha. Sab kuch bhaari lag raha hai.

variants.en: Thanks to God my mother recovered from illness, I am so grateful.
variants.hindi: Khuda ka shukar hai meri maa ki tabiyat theek ho gayi, main bahut shukar guzar hoon.
